TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_paysin_nu_Bunun, title = u_paysin_nu_Bunun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_paysin_nu_Bunun} }

S.FORM: u paysin nu Bunun śó•ŚłłÁĒüśīĽÁ¶ĀŚŅĆ sapuelac 1. amana mukan: titi' nu bau, ungay, wacu, edu, nani', tumay, apap atu takula'. 2. amana mukan ku wawa: tangah nu aadupen, panga' atu puki, udu, kikul, tangila'. 3. amana mukan ku musabiliay: u atay, milisawada', balucu', tinayi', bituka, bala' atu ilalabu'ay nu kidu. 4. anu tayza maluk sa, amana malitemuh tu bau atu edu, anu mahiza sa, satezepaen tu maluk atu kawaw, kalamkam taluma'. 5. amana muesus iayaw nu babalaki, anu mahiza sa, apanubu cacay a pabuy. 6. anu maluk sa, aman muesue, amanu maesing, anu mahiza sa, satezepan tu kawaw, kalamkam taluma'. 7. piliyasi tu akak, anu muawaw i kawanan sa u daecusay, satezehan muculil, kalamkam taluma'. 8. amana miadup: anu matengil tu esus atu esing a suni', amana miadup. 9. amana mutuzu' tu bihekac ni Adek. 10. anu izaw ku laluma'ay tayza miadup sa, amana miasik, katukuk taluma' tu ku heni. anu mahiza sa, amasanek ku aadupen tu sanek nu miadupay. 1śúąŚąį8 .
S.PHON: u pajsin nu bunun ****** sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ *. amana mukan: titi Ē~ ° nu bau, uŇčaj, wa ¶u, …ôdu, nani Ē~ °, tumaj, apap atu takur~…ĺa Ē~ °. *. amana mukan ku wawa: taŇčańß nu aadup…ôn, paŇča Ē~ ° atu puki, udu, kikur~…ĺ, taŇčir~…ĺa Ē~ °. *. amana mukan ku musabir~…ĺiaj: u ataj, mir~…ĺisawada Ē~ °, bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, tinaji Ē~ °, bituka, bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu ir~…ĺar~…ĺabu Ē~ °aj nu kidu. *. anu tajza mar~…ĺuk sa, amana mar~…ĺit…ômuńß tu bau atu …ôdu, anu mańßiza sa, sat…ôz…ôpa…ôn tu mar~…ĺuk atu kawaw, kar~…ĺamkam tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *. amana mu…ôsus iajaw nu babar~…ĺaki, anu mańßiza sa, apanubu ¶a ¶aj a pabuj. *. anu mar~…ĺuk sa, aman mu…ôsu…ô, amanu ma…ôsiŇč, anu mańßiza sa, sat…ôz…ôpan tu kawaw, kar~…ĺamkam tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *. pir~…ĺijasi tu akak, anu muawaw i kawanan sa u da…ô ¶usaj, sat…ôz…ôńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, kar~…ĺamkam tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *. amana miadup: anu mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu …ôsus atu …ôsiŇč a suni Ē~ °, amana miadup. *. amana mutuzu Ē~ ° tu bińß…ôka ¶ ni ad…ôk. **. anu izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj tajza miadup sa, amana miasik, katukuk tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu ku ńß…ôni. anu mańßiza sa, amasan…ôk ku aadup…ôn tu san…ôk nu miadupaj. **** .
S.FORM: u paysin nu Bunun śó•ŚłłÁĒüśīĽÁ¶ĀŚŅĆ sapuelac 1. amana mukan: titi' nu bau, ungay, wacu, edu, nani', tumay, apap atu takula'. 2. amana mukan ku wawa: tangah nu aadupen, panga' atu puki, udu, kikul, tangila'. 3. amana mukan ku musabiliay: u atay, milisawada', balucu', tinayi', bituka, bala' atu ilalabu'ay nu kidu. 4. anu tayza maluk sa, amana malitemuh tu bau atu edu, anu mahiza sa, satezepaen tu maluk atu kawaw, kalamkam taluma'. 5. amana muesus iayaw nu babalaki, anu mahiza sa, apanubu cacay a pabuy. 6. anu maluk sa, aman muesue, amanu maesing, anu mahiza sa, satezepan tu kawaw, kalamkam taluma'. 7. piliyasi tu akak, anu muawaw i kawanan sa u daecusay, satezehan muculil, kalamkam taluma'. 8. amana miadup: anu matengil tu esus atu esing a suni', amana miadup. 9. amana mutuzu' tu bihekac ni Adek. 10. anu izaw ku laluma'ay tayza miadup sa, amana miasik, katukuk taluma' tu ku heni. anu mahiza sa, amasanek ku aadupen tu sanek nu miadupay. 1śúąŚąį8 .
S.PHON: u pajsin nu bunun ****** sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ *. amana mukan: titi Ē~ ° nu bau, uŇčaj, wa ¶u, …ôdu, nani Ē~ °, tumaj, apap atu takur~…ĺa Ē~ °. *. amana mukan ku wawa: taŇčańß nu aadup…ôn, paŇča Ē~ ° atu puki, udu, kikur~…ĺ, taŇčir~…ĺa Ē~ °. *. amana mukan ku musabir~…ĺiaj: u ataj, mir~…ĺisawada Ē~ °, bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, tinaji Ē~ °, bituka, bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu ir~…ĺar~…ĺabu Ē~ °aj nu kidu. *. anu tajza mar~…ĺuk sa, amana mar~…ĺit…ômuńß tu bau atu …ôdu, anu mańßiza sa, sat…ôz…ôpa…ôn tu mar~…ĺuk atu kawaw, kar~…ĺamkam tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *. amana mu…ôsus iajaw nu babar~…ĺaki, anu mańßiza sa, apanubu ¶a ¶aj a pabuj. *. anu mar~…ĺuk sa, aman mu…ôsu…ô, amanu ma…ôsiŇč, anu mańßiza sa, sat…ôz…ôpan tu kawaw, kar~…ĺamkam tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *. pir~…ĺijasi tu akak, anu muawaw i kawanan sa u da…ô ¶usaj, sat…ôz…ôńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, kar~…ĺamkam tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. *. amana miadup: anu mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu …ôsus atu …ôsiŇč a suni Ē~ °, amana miadup. *. amana mutuzu Ē~ ° tu bińß…ôka ¶ ni ad…ôk. **. anu izaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj tajza miadup sa, amana miasik, katukuk tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu ku ńß…ôni. anu mańßiza sa, amasan…ôk ku aadup…ôn tu san…ôk nu miadupaj. **** .
